title: AdvancedEco
description: This mod adds an Economy-System to your Minecraft world or server, featuring a bank system, a pay system and much more!
body:
# AdvancedEco

**First, I'd like to point out that this mod was created exclusively for my private server and therefore doesn't contain many survival elements. If you have any requests, just contact me on Discord. I'm open to new content or versions. Simply join my Discord server, let me know your wishes, and I'll implement them.**

**A comprehensive economy and city-building mod for Minecraft 1.20.1**

Transform your Minecraft world into a thriving economy with dynamic markets, jobs, rentals, and city decorations!

---

## 🌟 Features at a Glance

### 💰 Economy System
- **Personal Banking** - Every player gets their own bank account with a starting balance
- **Money Transfers** - Send money to other players instantly
- **HUD Display** - Your balance is always visible in the bottom-right corner
- **Admin Tools** - Full money management commands for server operators

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/989e7747b905c33b68445d493d2846e9d082dca7.png)


### 🛒 Dynamic Marketplace
Buy and sell items from any mod installed on your server!

- **Browse Everything** - Search through items from all installed mods with real-time autocomplete
- **Request Items** - Players can request new items to be added to the market
- **Admin Approval System** - Admins receive instant notifications for new requests
- **Modern UI** - Sleek, dark-themed interface inspired by modern Minecraft mods
- **Sound Effects** - Satisfying audio feedback for all interactions

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/635f772beac64bbf410b5fa338b1c15e269e6df6.png)


### 💼 Job System
Choose from three unique jobs and earn money by playing your way!

**🏹 Hunter**
- Earn money by defeating mobs
- Higher levels = bigger rewards
- Perfect for combat enthusiasts

**🎣 Fisher**
- Get paid for every catch
- Level up your fishing expertise
- Steady income while relaxing by the water

**🚶 Wanderer**
- Earn money just by exploring
- Passive income for every 100 blocks traveled
- Great for adventurers and builders

**Progression System:**
- Level up your job to increase earnings
- Track your XP and progress in real-time
- Switch jobs anytime (progress resets)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e652e05240fdb1cf2b18a5b21e56062ec1ef215.png)


### 🏘️ Area Management

**Area Marketplace (Buy & Own)**
- **Purchase Land** - Buy areas permanently with a one-time payment
- **Multiple Properties** - Own as many areas as you can afford
- **Full Customization** - Rename and describe your property
- **Trust System** - Grant building rights to specific players
- **Protected** - Only you and trusted players can build in your area

**Rental System (Weekly Leases)**
- **Rent Areas** - Pay weekly to lease an area
- **Flexible Terms** - Cancel anytime with 60% refund (if paid)
- **Auto-Payments** - Automatic weekly billing from your bank account
- **Renter Controls** - Customize building, breaking, and interaction permissions
- **Telephonebox Integration** - Manage rentals through in-world telephone blocks

### 🏙️ City Decoration Blocks
Bring your cities to life with hundreds of decorative items!

- **Coffee Shop Furniture** - Tables, chairs, and café decorations
- **City Streets** - Benches, bus stops, traffic lights, street lamps
- **Urban Details** - Mailboxes, trash cans, phone booths, and more
- **Variety** - Hundreds of unique blocks and items to choose from

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/549bb75caadef5b9213dd665af53cfb8ba19c8e7.png)


---

## 🎮 How to Play

### Starting Out
1. **Join the server** - You'll automatically receive your starting balance
2. **Check your balance** - Press `B` (default) or type `/balance`
3. **Choose a job** - Type `/job` to pick your profession
4. **Start earning** - Complete job activities to make money!

### Shopping
- Open the market with `/shop`, `/market`, `/markt`, or `/marktplatz`
- Search for any item across all installed mods
- Request items that aren't available yet
- Purchase approved items instantly

### Owning Land
- **Buy Areas**: Visit a Telephonebox block and browse available properties
- **Rent Areas**: Choose rental areas for weekly payments
- **Customize**: Add trusted players, rename areas, and set permissions
- **Protect**: Your areas are automatically protected from other players

---

## 📋 Commands

### Economy
- `/balance` - View your money
- `/pay <player> <amount>` - Send money to another player

### Jobs
- `/job` - Open the job selection menu
- `/job info` - View your current job details
- `/job leave` - Quit your current job

### Market
- `/shop` / `/market` / `/markt` / `/marktplatz` - Open the marketplace

### Area Management (Admin)
- `/areamarket` / `/areashop` - Manage area listings
- Areas can also be accessed via Telephonebox blocks

---

## 🎨 User Interface

All menus feature a **modern, dark-themed design** with:
- Smooth animations
- Intuitive navigation
- Color-coded feedback (green = success, red = error, blue = info)
- Sound effects for every action
- Responsive layouts that work on any screen size

---

## ⚙️ Configuration

Server administrators can customize:
- Starting balance for new players
- Job reward multipliers
- Weekly rental intervals
- Area protection settings

Config file: `config/advancedeco-common.toml`

---

## 🔧 For Server Owners

### Performance Optimized
- Separate server and client builds available
- Efficient data saving and loading
- Minimal server overhead
- Optimized event handling

### Admin Features
- Full economy control with admin commands
- Area management tools
- Player money manipulation
- Request approval system with notifications

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the mod from Modrinth
2. Place the `.jar` file in your `mods` folder
3. Start Minecraft/Server
4. Enjoy!

**Requirements:**
- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge 47.4.13 or higher

---

## 🎯 Perfect For

- **Economy Servers** - Complete money system with jobs and trading
- **City Roleplay** - Hundreds of decorative blocks and area ownership
- **Survival Servers** - Earn money through regular gameplay
- **Community Servers** - Player-driven marketplace and land economy

---

## 💡 Tips

- Choose your job based on your playstyle!
- Request expensive items early so admins can approve them
- Trusted players in your area have full building rights
- Weekly rentals auto-cancel if you run out of money
- Use the marketplace to find rare items from any other mod

---

**Start building your economic empire today!** 🏆

*Compatible with all other Forge mods - browse and buy their items in the marketplace!*
